Notes: Add a CNAME at an owner name that already has an A RRset, then query the owner for A and CNAME to observe server-specific conflict handling.

Steps.Description: Attempt to add a CNAME at cnameconflict.campus.edu. while an A RRset already exists there, without deleting the existing A.

Steps.Name: cnameconflict.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the original A RRset remains after the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: cnameconflict.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the CNAME was installed, rejected, or coexists with the A RRset.
